Mock Exam 1.question: What is the primary characteristic that distinguishes Fuzzy Logic from Bivalent Logic?

options.A: Fuzzy Logic uses only 0s and 1s.
options.B: Fuzzy Logic allows for degrees of truth between 0 and 1.
options.C: Fuzzy Logic is exclusively used in hardware.
options.D: Fuzzy Logic does not handle ambiguity.

Mock Exam 1.question: In the context of fuzzy sets, what does a membership value (µ) of 0.7 signify?

options.A: The element is 70% outside the set.
options.B: The element is 70% a member of the set.
options.C: The element is 7% a member of the set.
options.D: The element is not a member of the set.

options.D: To establish the core of a fuzzy set.

options.C: Union

options.C: All elements have membership values less than 1.
options.D: It must be a triangular membership function.

options.A: To convert fuzzy outputs to crisp values.

options.D: TSK models use only two rules, simplifying the rule base.
